prose: Fukui reactivity indices for benzaldehyde computed using DFT with B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier standard, density-fitted) in the gas phase at PySCF. Calculations performed on neutral (charge 0, mult. 1), cation (charge +1, mult. 2), and anion (charge -1, mult. 2) states. All three states converged; charge conservation checks passed (Σ f⁺ = 1.0000, Σ f⁻ = 1.0000). Most electrophilic site: carbonyl carbon (C, atom 3), f⁺ = 0.3994. Most nucleophilic site: oxygen (O, atom 1), f⁻ = 0.2384. Full atom-by-atom Fukui indices (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰) and dual descriptor reported in results above. Visualization saved; no warnings reported. Integrity status: ok, trustworthy.
